page: Amazon Web Services c8gd.12xlarge is a compute-optimized instance powered by custom AWS Graviton processors. Built on the ARMv9 architecture using Neoverse-V2 cores, this server features 48 dedicated physical cores and 48 vCPUs operating at 2.8 GHz without hyperthreading. The hardware configuration includes 96.0 GB of system memory, providing 2.0 GB of RAM per core, and a baseline network bandwidth of 22 Gbps. Local storage is provided via 2850 GB of NVMe SSD instance store volumes, managed under the Nitro hypervisor.

Benchmark data indicates strong multi-core performance and exceptional memory throughput. The instance achieves top-tier results in large-block memory bandwidth, with read speeds of 381.77 GB/sec and write speeds of 181.15 GB/sec. Multi-threaded operations scale efficiently, as demonstrated by top-tier scores in Geekbench multi-core testing, software compilation with Clang, and multi-threaded Bzip3 decompression. Database operations also perform at a top-tier level, while single-core processing and cryptographic tasks remain in the average range.

The ARM-based architecture delivers high resource density and power efficiency, translating to a highly cost-effective profile for compute-heavy and storage-intensive workloads. The combination of dedicated physical cores, high memory bandwidth, and fast local NVMe storage makes this instance well-suited for database hosting, high-throughput web serving, software compilation pipelines, and multi-threaded data compression tasks.
description: Amazon Web Services c8gd.12xlarge is an ARM64 compute-optimized instance powered by 48 dedicated AWS Graviton Neoverse-V2 physical cores running at 2.8 GHz. It features 96.0 GB of system memory, 2850 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, and a baseline network bandwidth of 22 Gbps. Operating on the Nitro hypervisor, the instance delivers top-tier multi-core performance, large-block memory bandwidth, and database processing capabilities. While single-core performance is average, its high multi-threaded efficiency and integrated high-speed local storage offer a cost-effective platform for database operations, software compilation, and high-throughput static web serving.
og_description: Amazon Web Services c8gd.12xlarge is an ARM64 compute-optimized instance featuring 48 Graviton physical cores, 96 GB RAM, 2850 GB NVMe SSD storage, and top-tier multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services c8gd.12xlarge is an ARM64 compute-optimized instance with 48 Graviton cores, 96 GB RAM, and 2850 GB NVMe SSD local storage.
tagline: An ARM64 compute-optimized platform featuring dedicated physical cores, high-speed local NVMe storage, and top-tier multi-threaded memory bandwidth.
bullet_points: 48 dedicated AWS Graviton Neoverse-V2 physical cores on ARM64 architecture
96.0 GB of system memory with top-tier large-block read and write bandwidth
2850 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD instance storage
22 Gbps baseline network bandwidth running on the Nitro hypervisor
Top-tier performance in database operations and multi-threaded software compilation
